title: Logfia lojaconoi

The plant is also known as a rare species, found in the Andes mountains. Logfia lojaconoi is often classified as a type of daisy or composite flower. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
